2605.25861.title: MuNet: A Mutualistic Network for Joint 3D Human Mesh Recovery and 3D Clothed Human Reconstruction from Single Images
2605.25861.paper_summary: 3D human mesh recovery and 3D clothed human reconstruction are inherently related, yet they have long been studied in isolation, thereby overlooking the potential gains of joint optimization. To overcome this limitation, we propose to address these two tasks within a unified framework, which allows their mutual dependencies to be effectively exploited. Building on this idea, we propose MuNet, a mutualistic network for joint 3D human mesh recovery and 3D clothed human reconstruction from single images. First, we adopt 2-manifold graphs as a unified representation for all 3D models, enabling consistent modeling across 3D human mesh recovery and clothed human reconstruction. Second, we design an end-to-end graph convolutional network that progressively deforms an initial graph into a 3D human mesh and refines it into a detailed 3D clothed human model. Third, we introduce a mutualistic mechanism that allows reciprocal interaction between the two tasks {during training}, where 3D human mesh recovery provides guidance for 3D clothed human reconstruction, and reconstruction feedback refines the 3D human mesh recovery. We extensively evaluate MuNet on six benchmark datasets for 3D human mesh recovery and 3D clothed human reconstruction, including Human3.6M, 3DPW, MPI-INF-3DHP, THuman2.0, CAPE, and RenderPeople. Experimental results demonstrate that MuNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on both tasks across all datasets. The code of MuNet is released for research purposes at https://github.com/starVisionTeam/MuNet.
2605.25861.paper_summary_zh: 3D 人體網格恢復和 3D 穿衣人體重建本質上是相關的，但它們長期以來一直被孤立地研究，從而忽略了聯合優化的潛在收益。為了克服這一限制，我們提出在統一框架內處理這兩個任務，這使得它們的相互依賴性能夠有效地被利用。基於這一理念，我們提出了 MuNet，一個用於從單幅圖像中進行聯合 3D 人體網格恢復和 3D 穿衣人體重建的互惠網絡。首先，我們採用 2-流形圖作為所有 3D 模型的統一表示，從而實現 3D 人體網格恢復和穿衣人體重建之間的一致建模。其次，我們設計了一個端到端的圖卷積網絡，逐步將初始圖形變形為 3D 人體網格，並將其精煉為詳細的 3D 穿衣人體模型。第三，我們引入了一種互惠機制，允許這兩個任務在訓練過程中相互作用，其中 3D 人體網格恢復為 3D 穿衣人體重建提供指導，而重建反饋則精煉 3D 人體網格恢復。我們在六個基準數據集上廣泛評估了 MuNet，這些數據集包括 Human3.6M、3DPW、MPI-INF-3DHP、THuman2.0、CAPE 和 RenderPeople。實驗結果表明，MuNet 在所有數據集上都在這兩個任務中達到了最先進的性能。MuNet 的代碼已在 https://github.com/starVisionTeam/MuNet 上釋出，供研究用途。
2605.25861.author: Yunqi Gao et.al.
2605.25861.authors: Yunqi Gao, Leyuan Liu, Yuhan Li, Changxin Gao, Jingying Chen
